subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was perused. It betokened submission and humility, and was a proof of attraction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ملاحظه گردید دلیل بر خضوع و خشوع بود و برهان انجذاب
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @love of God
